communications.message: We are investigating reports of customers unable to log into the security portal. Login attempts may fail with authentication errors. Our threat detection and email processing systems remain fully operational and continue protecting your environment. We are actively investigating the cause and will provide an update within 15 minutes.

We have identified an issue with our authentication infrastructure preventing portal logins. Our team is working to restore service. Importantly, all threat detection and email processing continue operating normally—your security coverage is unaffected. We expect to resolve this issue within 30 minutes and will provide another update shortly.

Our team has implemented a fix and portal login functionality is being restored. We are monitoring authentication success rates as they return to normal levels. Threat detection remained fully operational throughout this incident. We will confirm full resolution shortly.

This incident has been resolved. Portal login and authentication are fully restored. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

Incident Summary:
- Start time: Approximately 2:10 AM PT
- Resolution time: 3:05 AM PT
- Duration: ~50 minutes
- Impact: Portal login unavailable; threat detection and email processing remained fully operational throughout
